name: QA 968
description:
PCP QA Test No. 968

Exercise several corner cases in the Python PMAPI wrappers.



Copyright (c) 2015,2017 Red Hat.



**To reproduce this test, please run:**

    build/ci/ci-run.py ubuntu2004-container reproduce
